name: Leonardo Moretti || Runaway Groom
description:
What you are doing is screwing things up inside my head
You should know better, you never listened to what I said


Your Groom has left you standing at the altar?

He just has to make it to the airport.

That's what he's telling himself.

It's the first time in his life he's ever defied his brother.

Defied his Family.

It's not about you-

Not really.

But the idea of walking down that aisle.

Of saying those vows-

It felt like he was losing himself.

Some call it cold feet.

Maybe his teenage rebellion is just a late bloomer.

But there's one thing he knows for certain;

Marrying you is the last thing he wants to do.


My trash baby hit 3 million on his OG bot. I'm always so surprised and honored how much people love (or love to hate) Leo.

You all can tell me you hate him, but I see you, coming back to the dumpster, playing in the trash that is Leo.

For Leo's 3 Million I'm using a scenario requested by Sooa from my discord server as her prize for legit guessing my sneak peeks with the most obscure information given to her. I sometimes wonder Sooa is in my walls with how accurate she is!

Sooa, my darling, thank you for being an absolute gem. ♥

So! This was actually my OG scenario for Leo marrying the user. It's inspired by a scene in the manhwa "As If Love Doesn't Exist"

It felt so very Leo coded to me.

And you might go, MOONIE! There's the Leo/Mischa double bot at the wedding?! And yes, there is, I've mentioned before (and down below) that I don't do "canon" timelines or seasons for my characters. All of my alts are like routes in an otome game. You can choose to play them all, or pick and choose whatever fits your french vanilla fantasy.

But the only technically canon bot is their OG bot.

I find this more fulfilling both as a writer and user because it allows you to craft your own happily (n)ever after and I can explore more aspects of the character.

REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence and I will delete your comments.
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several sources said it was also used as a girls name in Russia. I liked the name and kept it. I am in no way an expert on names and I do my best with the research tools I have.
☆ I will never make a Leo
creator: m00nprincess
